problem.title: Bulls and Cows
problem.description: You are playing the Bulls and Cows game with your friend.
assumptions: A bull = right digit, right position.
A cow = right digit, wrong position (not already counted as bull).

example.explanation: 1 bull (8 in position 1 both). 3 cows (1,7,0 are correct digits in wrong position).

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashMap
solutions.description: Count bulls (exact position matches) in a single pass, and simultaneously tally digit frequencies for non-bull positions in two arrays. A second pass over digit frequencies computes cows as the sum of minimums, capturing digits that appear in both strings but at different positions.
